title: Delhi-Bound IndiGo Flight Grounded At Bengaluru Airport After Hoax Bomb Threat Triggers Panic; 183 Flyers Evacuated
description: Panic broke out at Kempegowda International Airport early Sunday morning after a bomb threat was discovered on IndiGo flight 6E 870 bound for Delhi. The alert was triggered by a message written on a tissue paper found inside the cabin just before takeoff.
